Hero.title: Professional Support in Visa Matters
descr: We provide visa services to our clients, which include: consulting, assistance in preparing documents, and help with scheduling online appointments at immigration offices, with follow-up support during document submission. At a time when every minute can be important, our service frees you from days of waiting, stress, and uncertainty.
Our company is a team of professionals who work for you. We know all the intricacies of visa processes, so we take care of all the bureaucratic work.

About.title:
Our Company –

Your Trusted Partner in Migration Solutions
About.lead: Cita Master is a team that provides professional visa services to its clients. We understand how difficult it can be to do everything on your own, which is why we created a service that relieves you of this burden and guarantees results.

main: We strive to help people who find themselves in difficult circumstances to receive advice on visa matters and access important services without unnecessary problems. Our service was created with an understanding of the needs of those facing migration challenges and is aimed at simplifying this process.

Our team monitors appointment availability in real-time to secure the date you need as quickly as possible. From consultation to confirmation, we stay connected with you, addressing all your questions along the way.
Transparent pricing with no hidden fees or upfront payments. Personalized service that considers your preferences for region, type of service, and urgency.
extra: We operate legally, in full compliance with all regulations, with clear and transparent terms.
Every client matters to us, and we go above and beyond to exceed your expectations.
Our team has extensive experience with Migration matters and knows how to make the booking process fast and efficient.
Officially registered company adhering to all legal standards.
A clear service agreement prepared by top legal experts.
Secure payment methods through trusted banking systems.
Over 2,000 satisfied clients who trust us with their Migration needs.

Advantages.title: Our Advantages
list: You no longer need to constantly refresh the Migration portal or spend time searching for available slots. We’ll handle it for you!
We work to ensure that you receive the service you need as quickly as possible. In most cases, it takes only 2–5 business days, depending on the type of request.
No hidden fees or prepayments. Payment is made only after the service is successfully completed.
We operate officially, with clear contractual terms, ensuring the confidentiality of your data.
Our specialists are always available to answer your questions and provide consultation.

list.title: You fill out the form on our website with the following details
Our team will contact you to confirm the details.
descr: We strictly adhere to GDPR (General Data Protection Regulation).
Upon completion of the service, you may request the deletion of your personal data.
Your information is used solely for booking purposes and is never shared with third parties.
We send you an official contract for review and agreement.

list.title: Booking
descr: Express service type: you receive the required service within 5 business days.
Standard service type: you receive the required service within 14 business days.

list.title: Confirmation and Payment
descr: We send you a confirmation of your appointment.
You verify the details of the appointment.
Upon your confirmation, we issue an invoice for payment.
Payment Methods: Payment is made officially to the company's bank account.

list.a: We provide visa services to our clients, which include: consulting, assistance in preparing documents, and help with scheduling online appointments at immigration offices, with follow-up support during document submission.

It can be said that a "sita" is analogous to a ticket in a ASC (Administrative Services Center). A "sita" serves as confirmation of a scheduled appointment with the migration service for a specific date and time. Each "sita" is personalized. It cannot be transferred to another person, nor can the date or time of the appointment be changed.

We are a team that provides professional visa services to our clients. We understand how difficult it can be to handle everything on your own, which is why we created a service that takes this burden off your shoulders and guarantees results.

list.q: How much does your service cost?
list.a: The cost of our service depends on the type of service and the selected appointment date. You can find out the price after submitting your request.

Under no circumstances! We do not require any prepayment for our services. Payment is made only after the service is provided — only after you personally verify the availability and accessibility of the "sita" on the official website of the Extranjería (migration service).

Order.title: Get a consultation
Order.descr:
Contact us now!

Our experts will respond within 15 minutes

Footer.legal: Any questions, inquiries, or concerns from government authorities are accepted via email

Cookies.title: We use cookies
Cookies.descr: To improve your experience on our website, we use cookies. By continuing to browse, you agree to their use.

Policy.title: Privacy Policy
Policy.content:
This document describes the privacy policy for the website citamaster.com (hereinafter referred to as the Site). This document explains what types of information may be collected and stored on the Site, and how this information may be used and disclosed.

Personal data means information or a set of information about an individual who is identified or can be identified.

The visitor may be asked to provide personal data for the purpose of registration on the Site. After completing the form to receive company news, as well as the feedback forms posted on the Site, it is considered that the visitor has given consent to the company to process their personal and contact data.

The Site may store information about connections, traffic, date, and duration of the user's activity on the Site. Visitors' personal data are used to ensure information exchange, relations in the field of advertising and communication in accordance with the laws of Ukraine "On Personal Data Protection", "On Information", "On Advertising", "On Telecommunications", "On Entrepreneurship", "On Protection of Information in Information and Telecommunication Systems", ND TZI 2.5-010-03 "Requirements for Information Protection of WEB Pages from Unauthorized Access". Visitors' personal data may be stored for up to 3 years.

The Site records the domain name or IP address of the visitor's computer, the date of file access (file name and URL), HTTP response code, and the website from which the visitor accessed the Site, as well as the number of bytes transferred during the session.

When operating the Site, cookies are used to support security features and their operation. Cookies also allow tracking violations of the privacy policy and terms of use by visitors and/or their devices. Collection and use of personal data.

Terms of Information Provision (Disclaimer)

The Site may contain links to other websites. Such links are provided solely for informational purposes and help us to present information more fully or illustrate the posted material. The fact that we provide links to external resources does not mean that we fully endorse the positions or ideas expressed there, nor do we guarantee the accuracy of the information posted there. We are not responsible for the privacy policies or content of these websites. If you have any questions or concerns regarding this policy, you may contact us at sales@citamaster.com.

Automatic collection and use of information.

The following information is automatically collected and stored:

  • domain name,
  • IP address used to access the Site;
  • type of browser and operating system;
  • date and time of visiting the Site;
  • pages viewed – if you accessed the Site via a link from another website – the address of that website.

Information about traffic passing through the network, via email, and user activity on the Internet on the Site is protected in accordance with the law. This means that Company employees cannot interfere with the secrecy of telecommunications. We have the right to provide any personal information of Site visitors upon request of law enforcement authorities, by court decision, or within other lawful procedures, or upon any other lawful request in accordance with the current legislation of Ukraine.

We are not responsible for lost profits, unrealized gains, loss of data, or any other damages incurred by Site visitors while using the Site. The visitor uses the Site at their own risk. To the maximum extent permitted by law, neither the Company nor any other party involved in creating, producing, or maintaining the Site shall be liable for any direct, indirect, or incidental damages that have ever been caused and were triggered by the fact that the visitor had access to the Site, used it, or relied on it, even if the visitor was warned about the possibility of such damages and losses. Site visitors are not allowed to distribute, modify, transmit, use, or reuse any information from the Site for any public or commercial purpose without the Company's written permission. Visitors must comply with all copyright and other proprietary notices on downloaded and/or copied materials.

Copied information must contain an active hyperlink to the Site. Copying information from the Site may be carried out for non-commercial purposes for размещение on the visitor's pages, in blogs, and social networks.
When working with the Site, the visitor is not granted intellectual property rights to any site, its content, or the use of any branding elements or logos of the Site.

If you visit this Site, you automatically agree to this privacy policy and its terms. If you do not agree with this privacy policy and its terms, you may leave this Site.

Changes to the Privacy Policy

By using the Site, the visitor accepts the terms of this privacy policy, acknowledges, and agrees that this Privacy Policy may change from time to time. Changes made to the Privacy Policy are published on this page of the Site. In certain cases, we reserve the right to publish separate privacy notices for specific programs.
